PowerShell($coreText = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\('C:\\Users\\arthu\\GitHub\\opt\\mvp-powershell\\OptimizerCore.ps1', [Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $ps = [powershell]::Create\(\); [void]$ps.AddScript\({ param\($coreText, $action, $ids\) Invoke-Expression $coreText; Initialize-Optimizer; $result = @{ ok = 0; fail = 0 }; foreach \($id in $ids\) { $t = Get-TweakById -Id $id; try { Undo-Tweak -Tweak $t; $result.ok++ } catch { $result.fail++ } }; $result }\).AddArgument\($coreText\).AddArgument\('revert'\).AddArgument\(@\('GameDVR'\)\); $h = $ps.BeginInvoke\(\); while \(-not $h.IsCompleted\) { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 100 }; $out = $ps.EndInvoke\($h\); $ps.Dispose\(\); $r = $out[$out.Count-1]; Write-Host "JOB OK — ok=$\($r.ok\) fail=$\($r.fail\)")
